steps.name: There is TeamOwner with team DeleteChannel on Staging backend
User TeamOwner configures MLS for team DeleteChannel
TeamOwner enables channel feature for team DeleteChannel via backdoor
User TeamOwner adds users Member1,Member2 to team DeleteChannel with role Member
Register sender device and send connection request to receiver via backend
TeamOwner has channel conversation Delete in team DeleteChannel
User TeamOwner is me
User Member1 and Member2 are available for channel participant selection
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as TeamOwner
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
And I see conversation Delete in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name Delete in conversation list
And I tap on channel conversation title Delete to open group details
And I open participants tab and start add participant flow
And I select Member1 and Member2 from participant suggestions
And I verify Member1 and Member2 are added to participants list and click close button
And I tap on channel conversation title Delete to open group details
And I see Delete as channel name
And I tap on Delete channel name
When I change channel name to NewDelete as new channel name
Then I see NewDelete as channel name
And I see conversation is renamed toast message
When I tap show more options button
And I tap Delete Conversation button
And I tap Remove Conversation button in remove conversation confirmation modal
Then I see removed toast message for NewDelete
Then I do not see conversation NewDelete in conversation list
And I start a new conversation flow
And I search for Member1 and start 1:1 conversation
And I send message Hello Team member in the new 1:1 conversation
And I close the connected user profile page
And I close the search input field
And I close new conversation flow and return to conversation list
steps.statusMessage: Conversation list was not visible again within 5000ms
